signals.headline: Trump Announces Iran Deal to be Signed Tonight Ahead of 8 PM ET Deadline, Potentially Reopening Strait of Hormuz | YES |
signals.raw:
Trump Announces Iran Deal to be Signed Tonight Ahead of 8 PM ET Deadline, Potentially Reopening Strait of Hormuz | YES | HIGH confidence**[1][3]

President Trump stated on Fox Business that a deal with Iran "will be signed tonight," amid escalating tensions in the Strait of Hormuz, where Iran must comply or face US military action against its infrastructure by 8 PM Eastern (1 AM UTC April 22).[1][

signals.headline: Hawks Level Knicks Series 1-1; Timberwolves Tie Nuggets 1-1 in Game 2s | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
Hawks Level Knicks Series 1-1; Timberwolves Tie Nuggets 1-1 in Game 2s | YES | MED confidence**
